page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g9i.24xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 96 dedicated physical cores and 96 vCPUs using the x86_64 architecture, running on an Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor clocked at 3.2 GHz. The instance is equipped with 384.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

This instance does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, requiring external block storage for operating system and application data. It provides a baseline network bandwidth of 32 Gbps to support multi-node communication and external data transfers. No complimentary public IPv4 addresses are bundled with the instance.

With a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, the ecs.g9i.24xlarge is designed for general-purpose enterprise workloads. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent compute performance without resource contention, making it suitable for application servers, web serving, containerized microservices, and medium-sized database deployments.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g9i.24xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 96 dedicated vCPUs and 96 physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor running at 3.2 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture and managed via the KVM hypervisor, it provides 384.0 GB of RAM, establishing a balanced 4.0 GB per core ratio. The instance does not include local storage or GPUs, relying on network-attached storage and offering a baseline network bandwidth of 32 Gbps. Designed for workloads requiring consistent, non-shared CPU resources, it is suited for enterprise application hosting, web serving, container orchestration, and general-purpose business applications.

tagline: A dedicated ninety-six core enterprise instance offering balanced compute and memory resources with high-speed baseline networking.
